paper_cards.title: ResearchOS: Auditable Multi-Agent Research Workflows
paper_cards.problem: We describe a code-first system that structures literature ingestion, gap mapping, experiment execution, auditing, and evidence-driven writing into a recoverable research workflow.
paper_cards.method_summary: We describe a code-first system that structures literature ingestion, gap mapping, experiment execution, auditing, and evidence-driven writing into a recoverable research workflow.
